description_long: This is a stylized child figure dressed in a ninja-inspired outfit, featuring a fitted mask covering the lower face and a headband with a rectangular tail extending from the back. The child has short sleeves and shorts, with a belt tied at the waist and gloves covering the hands. The skin is visible on the arms and legs, and the feet are clad in simple, blocky shoes. The overall form is cartoonish, with exaggerated proportions such as a large head and short limbs. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, with a color palette dominated by green, black, and brown tones.
description: A cartoonish child dressed in a ninja-style outfit with a mask, headband, gloves, and blocky shoes. The figure has a large head, short limbs, and a matte, slightly rough surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, outstretched arms, belt, and blocky shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the headband tail, profile of the mask, and the arm's thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, headband tail, and the tied belt at the waist.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the headband tail and the side profile of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve top with mask, shorts, gloves, and a tied belt
attribute_hairstyle: short hair tied in a small bun with a headband
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
